item.title: People suck
item.description:
Found this while getting my kids into the car to drive them to school. I dont even have a fancy EV, so it wasnt Tesla or Prius hate. Nope. Just a cheap crappy Chevy. How am I supposed to get my kids to school? The thing that concerns me is that this is exactly the kind of property damage that is likely to become a repeated incident. I really hope it was just some rando who was passing through. Ugh. Anyone out there know if it can be re-terminated or if I will have to buy a new cable for 180$ And while Im asking, if anyone knows an honest electrician in Seattle, a rec would be super helpful. I am just so sick of shitty people doing shitty things. I just want to be left alone and now I cant even charge my damn car. And yes, I am totally having a pity party I just dont care. Its healthy to rant sometimes.
FTW
item.dc:creator: METROlD

item.title: Haters gonna hate. Bigots gonna bigot.
item.description:
Saw this on Facebook earlier. Thought, hey wait a minute! I've seen this one before!
That's right, we already had this LAST MONTH ffs.
so I called him out. Fuck fake support, and fuck this guy for trying to steal Pride month with it. I'm a cis straight* white* male, but just because Pride isn't for me doesn't mean I'm not here for it. *well, mostly. MV edit: @ConstantBitRate brought this IG post to my attention and I absolutely love it. Give these folks a follow - especially if you're in the Detroit area. https://www.instagram.com/reel/C79imUnu_wx/
item.dc:creator: thetonestarr

item.dc:creator: ButtBot9900

item.title: Irish man loses defamation case, as Judge finds he had no good reputation to defame.
item.description: This man is Enoch Burke. There is a whole saga involved, but in this latest round, he took a newspaper to court. The newspaper claimed he had to be moved around his prison because he would no shut up about his religious persecution and the guards were concerned about his safety around others. It turns out this never happened, and the Judge found the story was untrue. However, for it to be defamation, his reputation had to be harmed. And as the Judge explained "people think I am an annoying man who won't shut up about religion" isn't a harmed reputation, if you have built up a reputation as an annoying man who won't shut up about his religion. Enoch was a teacher at a Church of Ireland school, which asked teachers to use a trans students new pronouns. Enoch refused, and protested. The student wasn't in his class, but he went out of his way to escalate. He was asked, then warned, then, suspended with pay, then barred from the premises, then sacked and carried on escalating through court appearances. He ended up jailed for refusing to purge contempt, was released for trying to spin his sentence as persecution in an effort to benefit from the sentence, and then sent back to prison when he continued to violate court orders barring him from the school. He and his family have disrupted numerous court cases, with his barrister sister called out by Judges for very flawed understandings of the law, and his Da assaulting a Garda (cop). At every opportunity he and his family have irritated people, and made a massive deal about their religious beliefs. So the Judge determined that it wasn't the newspaper that created this image of him in the popular consciousness, but his own actions. https://www.rte.ie/news/courts/2024/0613/1454529-enoch-burke/ Front page edit: Apologies, the summary of the background school incident isn't perfect. I kind of expected this post to just be a couple of paddies laughing at Burke. Again, So I half assed the background since most Irish are sick of hearing about him at this stage. TLDR, he went looking for a fight about pronouns. The school and courts were deliberately focused on the harassment of staff and refusal to abide by court rulings. Wikipedia has a better summary for those interested in context: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Burke_family_(Castlebar) And if this is still a thing: send Blåhaj memes :)
item.dc:creator: gallowglacht

item.title: Bottom shelf kind of memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Neat!
item.description:
Not my OC, but I hope y’all don’t mind my sharing it anyway! Here’s where I found it: https://bsky.app/profile/rachellense.bsky.social/post/3kuu2yshags2t
Here’s a screenshot with the alt text if you want to know the source of each stripe;
And here’s just the image. FP Edit: I'm glad people like this too! Be excellent to each other. And a friendly reminder: you help determine whether your community supports LGBTQ+ kids, so please vote even in lower-level elections (like for school boards). https://vote.gov has more for U.S. citizens; please comment with any equivalent sites for other countries!

item.title: Pride month: work in progress
item.description:
Before and after.
Proof that I still smile for pictures sometimes. And that I sweat a lot after drumming. And that I can't clean my mirror for shit. Before I came out, I spent a few months in therapy freaking out about losing everything I'd worked for--job, friends, my SO. I haven't lost any of it. It went okay. For my trans friends who aren't out yet: Look, I'm not gonna bullshit you--it's still tough some days. Mirrors aren't nice to me, hormone shots suck, laser hurts like a bitch, surgery is a forever waitlist, on and on. But if I can get this far, I promise you can too. So if you're struggling, if you're hiding from yourself, if you're telling yourself you won't make it--give yourself a chance. It's worth it.
item.dc:creator: AndThenThereWereSquirrels

item.title: The Goonies (1985) - Behind the Scenes
item.description:
The historic Stage 15 on the Warner Bros Studio lot is where the Pirate ship was built and filmed. Other movies and shows filmed there include: The Big Sleep, Mildred Pierce, Strangers on a Train, Mister Roberts, The Old Man and the Sea, The Great Race, Ghostbusters, Flatliners, Batman Returns, Demolition Man, Executive Decision, Batman Forever, The Perfect Storm and the TBS Conan O'Brian talkshow - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d5bhIEqk-9c
The waterslide cavern was built solely for filming, but the cast and crew (including director Richard Donner himself) would sneak in after hours to take it for a spin.
The deleted scene featuring the giant octopus - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8hXmqpExeZU
Ghostbusters - https://imgur.com/gallery/LsBvyll Doctor Who - https://imgur.com/gallery/JxXJqzd Stargate - https://imgur.com/gallery/nXYrraP TMNT - https://imgur.com/gallery/WzuWWxX Star Trek TOS - https://imgur.com/gallery/4SPJxyX TNG - https://imgur.com/gallery/CMgsCIy DS9 - https://imgur.com/gallery/S8ISUlZ VOY - https://imgur.com/gallery/YDc2PD2 ENT - https://imgur.com/gallery/ov74iIE 09 - https://imgur.com/gallery/Odj24Cz Star Wars Ep1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/gkRgfe9 Xena - https://imgur.com/gallery/Hws7HQl The Mummy - https://imgur.com/gallery/GUrb6Oa Speed - https://imgur.com/gallery/TQ9uQuP Mary Poppins - https://imgur.com/gallery/f6WgNlR Sesame Street - https://imgur.com/gallery/f3RafRD Dragonslayer - https://imgur.com/a/YSwNblp The Great Race - https://imgur.com/gallery/tO9DeWn Black Lagoon - https://imgur.com/gallery/EraNuoW Chip 'n Dale - https://imgur.com/gallery/L6uxizO

item.title: The love story of Richard and Mildred Loving led to the historic Supreme Court case sweeping away the latest segregation laws in America(image is colorized).
item.description:
At 2 a.m. on July 11, 1958, newlyweds Richard and Mildred Loving were jostled out of their bedroom by a Virginia sheriff. "What are you doing in bed with this woman?" the sheriff demanded of Richard, a white man. "I'm his wife," Mildred, a Black and Indigenous American woman replied. The sheriff barked, "Not here you& are not."⁠ At the time, interracial marriage was still illegal in Virginia, and the Lovings were arrested for unlawful cohabitation. Exiled from their hometown for nine years, the couple eventually decided to take the state to the Supreme Court — and in 1967, the historic ruling on Loving v. Virginia decriminalized interracial marriage all across the country.
The Lovings family
The original image that is not colorized
item.dc:creator: scarcestories
